channel.title: Transcription on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Transcription on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: LLM Speech API in Azure AI Speech
item.description:
Azure AI Speech has made the LLM Speech API generally available. It adds LLM-based transcription and translation for audio files, supports 25 languages across 90+ locales, and includes accuracy, region, and enhancement updates.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: ai: Foundry Local 1.1: Live Transcription, Embeddings, and Responses API
item.description:
Foundry Local 1.1 adds live transcription, embeddings, a Responses API, a WebGPU plugin, and download cancellation. The update expands local model capabilities and adds controls for managing downloads.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
